demo.title: grey-ridge-x402.sh
demo.code:
# Free preview — no wallet needed
curl -s https://x402-data-api.sigrunner.workers.dev/chain/gas-price/preview

# Base RPC wallet bundle with USD (pay $0.003 USDC via x402, no API key)
curl https://x402-data-api.sigrunner.workers.dev/chain/wallet?address=0x...

# Cross-venue funding-rate arbitrage
curl -s https://x402-data-api.sigrunner.workers.dev/crypto/funding/preview

# Live Polymarket markets
curl -s https://x402-data-api.sigrunner.workers.dev/pm/markets/preview

setup: No signup: use x402 — pay $0.001-$0.10 USDC per call on Base, no API key
MCP (20 tools): add the streamable-http server at https://x402-data-api.sigrunner.workers.dev/mcp
